content.title: Introducing MeshWeaver: The Future of Enterprise AI
content.text:
Excited to announce the launch of MeshWeaver - our new platform for building enterprise AI solutions.

MeshWeaver enables organizations to:
- Build agentic AI workflows without vendor lock-in
- Connect to any data source with our unified data layer
- Deploy on Azure with enterprise-grade security

After 2 years of development, we're ready to transform how enterprises adopt AI.

#AI #Enterprise #Innovation #MeshWeaver
content.author: Roland
